sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37732" key="e)cwke/lhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξωκέλης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n37732.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">barebacked horse,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> <sense n="II" id="n37732.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">piratical craft,</tr_> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
